compiled_state.title: GREEN: Extract scrutiny pipeline from brainstorm into shared workflow
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Extract brainstorm's inline scrutiny steps into a shared workflow and update brainstorm to invoke it.

### Part A: Create shared pipeline
Create plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md containing the extracted steps from brainstorm SKILL.md:
- Step 2.5: Gap Analysis (Self-Review) — the full gap analysis logic including artifact gap check and success criteria gap check
- Step 2.6: Web Research Phase — bright-line trigger conditions, WebSearch/WebFetch usage, graceful degradation
- Step 2.75: Scenario Analysis — full/reduced/skip modes, red team + blue team sub-agent dispatch, scenario output format
- Step 3: Run Fidelity Review — three core reviewers (agent-clarity, scope, value) + conditional feasibility reviewer, pass threshold, revision protocol

The pipeline must accept a generic structured input (epic spec with Context, Success Criteria, Approach sections) and produce a scrutiny report. Write the pipeline in a caller-agnostic way — both brainstorm and roadmap will invoke it.

### Part B: Update brainstorm SKILL.md
Replace the inline scrutiny steps (Steps 2.5, 2.6, 2.75, and Step 3 fidelity review) with a single instruction to read and execute the shared pipeline from plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md.

Preserve:
- Step 1 (Socratic dialogue) — remains inline
- Step 2 (Approach Design) — remains inline
- Step 4 (Complexity evaluation) — remains inline
- Phase 3 (Ticket Integration) — remains inline

### Part C: Remove .test-index RED marker

SAFEGUARD FILE: plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md is protected per CLAUDE.md rule 18.

## File Impact
- CREATE: plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- MODIFY: .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Pipeline file exists and is non-empty
  Verify: test -s $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md
- [ ] Brainstorm references shared pipeline
  Verify: grep -q 'shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] No inline scrutiny step definitions remain in brainstorm
  Verify: { grep -q 'Step 2.5: Gap Analysis' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed
  Verify: { grep -q '\[test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index; test $? -ne 0; }
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ (7/7 epic-scrutiny-pipeline tests pass; ruff clean; scorer roadmap tests pre-existing RED from ticket e136-0ec7 — not in scope)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Scrutiny pipeline extracted to shared workflow
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
